channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Biathlon official apologizes to athletes who have suffered mistreatment
item.description: The secretary general of the International Biathlon Union apologized to any athlete who was mistreated during his tenure at U.S. Biathlon while speaking to a 90-minute meeting Tuesday that focused on concerns about athlete safety brought to light by multiple Associated Press reports.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: This Colorado restaurant only has 2 items on the menu
item.description: A Michelin-starred chef co-opened a restaurant in Denver with only two items on the menu: a burger and fries.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tom Cruise awarded highest Navy honor for a civilian
item.description: The 62-year-old actor was celebrated for his outstanding contributions to the Navy and the Marine Corps.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: FTC bans junk ticket, hotel fees
item.description: The final rule will become effective 120 days after its publication in the Federal Register, coinciding with the first few months of Trump’s administration.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, ABC 4

item.title: Shock poll: 41 percent of young voters find killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO acceptable
item.description: Anger over health insurance companies has been in the spotlight after Thompson was fatally shot Dec. 4 in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Trump tariff plan threatens to drive up gas prices
item.description: Andrew Lipow, president of consulting firm Lipow Oil Associates, said a 25 percent tariff amounts to a surcharge of about 40 cents per gallon.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, NewsNation

item.title: Suspect in Gilgo Beach serial killings is charged in the death of a seventh woman
item.description: The New York architect facing murder charges in a string of deaths known as the Gilgo Beach killings was charged on Tuesday in the death of a seventh woman.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump tariff plan threatens to drive up gas prices
item.description: Trump said that on his first day in office, he would place 25 percent tariffs on all Canadian and Mexican goods. The two countries are the leading sources of U.S. oil imports.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: Alabama woman doing well after experimental pig kidney transplant
item.description: Towana Looney is the fifth American given a gene-edited pig organ — and notably, she isn’t as sick as prior recipients who died within two months of receiving a pig kidney or heart.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 7.3 magnitude earthquake causes widespread damage on island nation of Vanuatu
item.description: A powerful magnitude 7.3 earthquake struck just off the coast of Vanuatu on Tuesday, causing widespread destruction in the South Pacific island nation as the injured began arriving at a hospital and unconfirmed reports of casualties emerged.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Madison, Wisconsin, school shooting suspect identified as 15-year-old girl
item.description: Fifteen-year-old Natalie Rupnow was the shooter who opened fire inside Abundant Life Christian School, killing a teacher and teen student, Madison police say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American tourist in Fiji among 7 hospitalized after drinking cocktails at luxury resort
item.description: Fiji officials are investigating after seven tourists vacationing at a popular hotel were hospitalized with severe symptoms Saturday after consuming cocktails at a resort bar.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Delta stowaway apprehended again after allegedly trying to cross border into Canada
item.description: Delta airlines stowaway suspect Svetlana Dali was apprehended once again after allegedly attempting to flee the U.S. for the Canadian border.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida man berated, physically abused child for nearly 30 minutes over missing couch cushion: deputies
item.description: A Florida man is facing child abuse charges after he allegedly screamed obscenities and physically abused a child over a missing couch cushion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Teacher and a student killed in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — A teenage student opened fire at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin on Monday, killing a teacher and another teenage student in the final week before Christmas break. The shooter also died, police said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tell Alexa to ‘Thank My Driver,’ and they’ll get $5 — at no cost to you
item.description: If you tell Alexa to "Thank my driver," your most recent Amazon delivery driver will get a $5 bonus at no charge to you. Shop these Amazon Echo devices to say thanks now.
item.dc:creator: Christina Marfice, ABC 4

item.title: Drone detectors in New Jersey have found 'little or no evidence' of wrongdoing, governor says
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — Drone-detecting devices deployed in New Jersey in the past week have found “little to no evidence” of anything nefarious or threatening, Gov.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS and MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man sentenced for helping pregnant Chinese women travel to give birth in the US
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A California man was sentenced Monday to nearly 3 1/2 years in prison for running an extensive business that helped pregnant Chinese women travel to the United States to deliver babies who would automatically have American citizenship. U.S.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump announces $100 billion investment from SoftBank
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is celebrating an announcement from Japanese technology company, SoftBank, that it plans to invest $100 billion into U.S. projects in the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Brandt, Fox 5

item.title: 16-year-old killed entire family, called 911, police say
item.description: BELEN, N.M. (KRQE) – On Sunday, New Mexico State Police (NMSP) released the names of the four victims from Saturday's homicide in Belen. Police said that 16-year-old Diego Leyva called 911 early Saturday morning and told the dispatcher he had killed his family.
item.dc:creator: Scott Brown, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump, Softbank CEO announce $100B SoftBank investment in the US
item.description: resident-elect Donald Trump will join SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son at his Florida home on Monday to announce that the Japanese company is planning to invest $100 billion in U.S. projects over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, WGN 9

item.title: The US Census Bureau is adding refugees to its immigrant count
item.description: The U.S. Census Bureau is changing how it counts immigrants in annual estimates by including more people who were admitted for humanitarian, and often temporary, reasons. The change is being made in an effort to better reflect population shifts this decade, officials said Monday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SCHNEIDER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California couple on vacation fatally shot in Mexico, officials say
item.description: An American couple from Northern California was shot and killed by gunmen in the western Mexican state of Michoacán, according to officials.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, KTLA 5

item.title: Bud Light no longer the best-selling draft beer at bars, data suggests
item.description: The overtaking of Bud Light as America's most popular draft beer has been "years in the making," according to the founder of Draftline Technologies, a company that provides software for beverage distributors.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Judge sentences Zephen Xaver, man who executed 5 women at Florida bank, to death
item.description: Zephen Xaver pleaded guilty to five counts of murder for killing Ana Piñon Williams, Debra Cook, Marisol Lopez, Cynthia Watson and Jessica Montague at a SunTrust Bank in Sebring, Florida in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Marino, KRON4

item.title: Ingrid Lewis-Martin, chief adviser to NYC Mayor Eric Adams, resigns and expects to be indicted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ingrid Lewis-Martin, a former top aide to New York Mayor Eric Adams, expects to be indicted on criminal charges related to alleged improper gifts, her lawyer said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump’s Mar-a-Lago press conference
item.description: President-elect Trump gave his first formal press conference since winning election last month, during which he announced a major Softbank investment in the U.S. and fielded a bevy of questions from reporters at Mar-a-Lago.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Mysterious drones shut down air base in Ohio
item.description: The sightings have caused concern in several states but many officials said the aerial objects are actually planes or helicopters. Police in Boston arrested two men after drones were spotted flying “dangerously close” to Logan International Airport.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Dill, Fox 5

item.title: Biden establishes a national monument for Frances Perkins, the 1st female Cabinet secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Monday established a national monument honoring the late FDR-era Labor Secretary Frances Perkins, the first woman to serve in a presidential Cabinet and a driving force behind Franklin D. Roosevelt's New Deal programs after the Great Depression.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, AAMER MADHANI and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Teacher and student killed, 6 injured in Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: A teacher and a student were killed in a shooting at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, police said Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Devin Willems, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James returns to score 18 in Lakers' win vs Grizzlies after missing 2 games with foot injury
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James returned to the Los Angeles Lakers on Sunday night in a 116-110 victory over the Memphis Grizzlies after a two-game break. James is fighting a left foot injury and was away from the team most of last week because of personal reasons.
item.dc:creator: KYLE GLASER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: McConnell urges Trump to reject isolationism
item.description: Outgoing Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) is calling on President-elect Trump to reject isolationists in the Republican Party who will argue for the United States to focus on China at the expense of Ukraine and other areas of the world.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Jalen Hurts accounts for 3 TDs and Eagles beat Steelers 27-13 for franchise-best 10th straight win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts absorbed the shots when the Eagles' recent anemic passing attack was panned by his own star wide receivers. Hurts and A.J.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Godiva steps in to help Metropolitan Ministries during holiday rush
item.description: The iconic pink Godiva truck brought treats for families and volunteers, but their real gift was a $25,000 donation to help restock shelves that have been emptying faster than ever.
item.dc:creator: Georgia McCarthur, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawmakers struggle to reach deal to avert government shutdown
item.description: Congressional negotiators are struggling to reach a deal to keep the government's lights on past Dec. 20. Text of a continuing resolution (CR) for a government funding package was expected Sunday ahead of the looming shutdown deadline.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, WGN 9

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Texas AG sues New York doctor for providing abortion pills across state lines
item.description: Both surgical and medication abortions are banned in Texas, and Friday’s lawsuit is the first legal test to see what happens when state abortion laws conflict with one another.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, WFLA, NBC
